meta.name: SW Design System Token Aliases
meta.description: State aliases and token aliases that bridge Figma naming, legacy naming, and canonical code naming.

complete.description: Figma 'complete' state = code 'filled' / content state. Container bg/border unchanged from default. Only text changes: placeholder → typed value.
notes: No separate bg or border tokens for 'complete' state.
Applies to: Input, DatePicker trigger, TimePicker trigger.

correct.description: HD-4: 코드/registry canonical 이름은 'correct'. Figma는 'success'라고 부르지만 코드 기준 correct로 통일.
notes: 'success'는 Figma alias일 뿐, 코드 토큰 리네임 불필요.

selected.description: Figma 'selected' state for Input = code 'focus' state. Figma variable: color/form-control/border/selected.
notes: Applies only to form-control (Input, Select, DatePicker trigger) — not Chip/Nav where 'selected' means chosen item.

success.description: Figma 'success' state = code 'correct' state. Mapping을 위한 Figma alias 기록.
notes: Figma 원본 state name. 코드에서는 'correct' 사용.

tokenAliases.reason: Filled (complete) state uses the same container background as default. No visual difference.
Filled (complete) state uses the same container border as default. No visual difference.
Correct border reuses the selected (focus) border value. Same Figma variable (color/form-control/border/selected).

figmaStateMapping.description: No bg/border token change. Placeholder text is replaced by typed value text token.
Border changes from default to selected/focus (blue). No bg change.
Border = same as focus (blue). Helper text = --color-text-state-correct (blue). Deprecated: 'correct'. Canonical: 'success'.
bg → disabled-bg. border → disabled-border. text → disabled-text.
